messages.content: Pull together everything I have found on vector-database options for our RAG — the findings and which sources I had already vetted (and why) — into one brief, from my research notes.

[note 2026-03-01] topic=auth — evaluated WorkOS vs Auth0 for SSO; WorkOS was cheaper at our seat count. source=[S100] WorkOS pricing page (vetted: skimmed, looks sound)
[note 2026-04-02] topic=pricing — usage-based tiers beat seat-based for infra buyers in interviews. source=[S101] pricing teardown notes (unvetted: queued to read)
[note 2026-05-03] topic=queue — LISTEN/NOTIFY held up to 2k jobs/min in a load test. source=[S102] queue load-test log (vetted: cross-checked a second source)
[note 2026-03-04] topic=caching — a 15s list cache cut the console p95 by roughly 3x. source=[S103] console perf trace (vetted: skimmed, looks sound)
[note 2026-04-05] topic=logsearch — BM25 ranking was enough for log search; lexical beat fuzzy matching. source=[S104] log-search eval sheet (unvetted: queued to read)
[note 2026-05-03] topic=vector-db (RAG) — pgvector HNSW hit ~0.93 recall@10 at ~8ms p50 on 2M vectors. source=[S12] pgvector HNSW benchmark (vetted: reproduced the recall numbers on our own data)
[note 2026-03-07] topic=mobile — Expo cut our iOS build time substantially. source=[S106] build-time notes (vetted: skimmed, looks sound)
[note 2026-04-08] topic=analytics — self-hosted Plausible covered our needs privately. source=[S107] Plausible eval (unvetted: queued to read)
[note 2026-05-09] topic=email — Resend deliverability matched Postmark in our test. source=[S108] deliverability test (vetted: cross-checked a second source)
[note 2026-03-10] topic=infra — a single t3.xlarge handled the demo load with headroom. source=[S109] sizing notes (vetted: skimmed, looks sound)
